/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_he_core.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_he_core.dir/tests/test_he_core.cpp.o -o test_he_core  libhe_core.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a /usr/local/lib/libseal-4.1.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/14/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
